title: crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. benthamiana
intro: Crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. benthamiana is a species of plant in the legume family Fabaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. benthamiana include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
